name: New Gold Inc.
description: New Gold Inc. is an intermediate gold producer with two 100%-owned Canadian operations: the Rainy River open pit and underground gold mine in Northwestern Ontario and the New Afton gold-copper block cave mine in south-central British Columbia. The company generated over $530 million in consolidated free cash flow in 2025 and reported $924.5 million in trailing revenue. New Gold has entered into an arrangement agreement to be acquired by Coeur Mining, subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals.
